title: Prepare v0.5.39 after lockfile bootstrap correction
rawUserRequest: 发布遇到流程或过时代码问题时先修复流程/代码，再继续 v0.5.39；授权 agent 判断、执行并监控 GitHub Actions，直到完成发布。

declaredIntent.summary: Rebind v0.5.39 candidate evidence to canonical main after the release-runner correction, merge and close it, then leave publication to exact-main audit.

outOfScope: Creating or moving the v0.5.39 tag or GitHub Release inside this Work Item
Changing release workflow, finalizer, validator, governance limits, repository settings, or unrelated product files
Rewriting immutable archived Work Item evidence
Bypassing PR, merge, ai-close-work-item, exact-main audit, or GitHub Actions monitoring

sources.reason: Canonical release evidence and governance terminology.
Required premerge finalization, PR, merge, closure, and exact-main ordering.
Hosted release source identity and publication boundary.
Fail-closed candidate and exact-main release audit.
Corrected exact-main publication workflow with explicit lockfile compiler bootstrap.
Provider evidence that the correction merged as 92e3e9d247a63f8f5ca5cc8e9ecb4afe37be1c2a.
Successful compatibility and compatibility-gate evidence for exact merged main.
Successful smoke evidence for exact merged main.
Successful CodeQL evidence for exact merged main.

riskAssessment.reason: Final evidence must bind deterministic candidate content to the new canonical default-branch identity and survive PR merge before publication.

executionDecision.reason: The correction is closed, exact base SHA and CI evidence are observed, and delegated release authority is explicit.

preReviewWarnings: Confirm candidate content is derived from clean branch HEAD while sourceCommit, tagTarget, and metadataCommit remain controlled origin/main references.
Do not publish or tag in this Work Item.
Complete independent evidence review before ai-finish.

checkpointPolicy.reason: Record at least one checkpoint before finishing to reduce mid-task drift.

acceptance: The Work Item starts from origin/main 92e3e9d247a63f8f5ca5cc8e9ecb4afe37be1c2a after PR #332 closure and successful exact-SHA post-merge Actions.
Candidate verification passes before metadata generation, including quality, release-state consistency, release evidence, SBOM, and provenance.

After ai-finish archives this Work Item, finalize-release-freeze-premerge regenerates release.json, release-state.json, release-freeze.json, and release-digests.json from clean candidate HEAD content with controlled origin/main identity.
sourceCommit, metadataCommit, and tagTarget retain controlled origin/main identity; sourceTree and archiveSha256 describe candidate content reproduced by the merge commit.
Archive growth 542 remains warning-only and no governance complexity threshold is increased.
The PR contains exactly this archived Work Item and generated release evidence, passes all GitHub Actions, and merges while preserving its source branch for lifecycle closure.
ai-close-work-item deletes the owned local and remote branches and synchronizes local main exactly to origin/main.
The exact merged main SHA passes post-merge Actions and local release/supply-chain audits before any v0.5.39 publication.
guidelines: Fail closed on release identity, lifecycle, source-tree, archive, or ownership mismatch.
Keep candidate content evidence distinct from the provider-bound merged identity.
Generate release status files through repository commands; never hand-edit them.
Preserve immutable archived evidence and one Work Item per PR.
Do not publish or tag until this Work Item is merged, closed, synchronized, and exact main is audited.

intent.problem: The release runner prerequisite and branch lifecycle setting are corrected and verified on merged main, but v0.5.39 metadata still binds the preceding main. A fresh final preparation Work Item must regenerate candidate evidence, merge it, close the Contract lifecycle, and prove exact merged-main parity before publication.
constraints: Use one branch based exactly on 92e3e9d247a63f8f5ca5cc8e9ecb4afe37be1c2a and one PR.
Run independent review before ai-finish so evidence remains mutable if a defect is found.
Run premerge finalization only after ai-finish on a clean archived candidate branch.
Do not modify implementation code, repository settings, or governance limits in this release-preparation Work Item.
Do not create or move v0.5.39 until merged-main Actions and local exact-main audits pass.
intent.rationale: The mandatory post-correction rebind makes candidate content explicit while the release workflow later resolves and verifies the unique canonical merge SHA before mutating tag or Release state.

scenarioCoverage.scenario: The runner-correction Work Item is archived, PR #332 is merged, closure deleted its branches, local main equals origin/main 92e3e9d2, and exact-main Actions passed.
The clean release-preparation candidate passes quality and all release/supply-chain checks before metadata regeneration.
No tag or GitHub Release is created during candidate preparation.
evidence: provider tag and Release absence checked before preparation

restrictedWriteApproval.reason: The user authorized process-first release corrections and delegated execution through publication.

rollbackNote: Revert this Work Item diff and restore related tests and docs.

budgetImpact.reason: One final release-preparation archive; archive growth remains warning-only.
